ddls:
CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition rating */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition rating */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, property view, search) */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property related to the activity (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date of the market trend */,
  "market_area" TEXT /* Area of the market trend (e.g., city, neighborhood) */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of market trend (e.g., sales, rentals) */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value of the market trend (e.g., average price, number of sales) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property comparison */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being compared */,
  "comparison_date" TEXT /* Date of the comparison */,
  "comparison_type" TEXT /* Type of comparison (e.g., sales, rentals) */,
  "comparison_value" REAL /* Value of the comparison (e.g., average price, number of sales) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id")
)
